_metadata.description: SAMPLE configuration for the S3 bucket size logging script. Copy this file, then replace every placeholder value below with your own before running.

_sql_reference._note: Run these once to create the required tables
_sql_reference.S3Bucket: CREATE TABLE S3Bucket (s3BucketId INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, bucketName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, createdDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, lastModifiedDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
_sql_reference.S3BucketBatch: CREATE TABLE S3BucketBatch (s3BucketBatchId INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, execStartDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, execEndDate DATETIME NULL, bucketCount INT NULL, totalSizeBytes BIGINT NULL, status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'running', notes TEXT NULL, createdDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
_sql_reference.S3BucketLog: CREATE TABLE S3BucketLog (s3BucketLogId BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, s3BucketBatchId INT NOT NULL, s3BucketId INT NOT NULL, sizeBytes BIGINT DEFAULT 0, objectCount BIGINT DEFAULT 0, logDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
